name: Design Spore
oneLiner: AI services studio — chatbots, automation, websites, and launches for businesses ready to actually use AI.

name: Mission Control
oneLiner: Unified business dashboard — Kanban task management, CRM with Gmail import, and an AI agent fleet manager with cost tracking.

name: Drawbridge
oneLiner: Chrome extension that lets you annotate your live website like Figma comments and sends those annotations directly to Claude Code as tasks.

name: Government AI Consulting
oneLiner: AI readiness briefings, policy frameworks, and implementation support for BC local and regional governments.

name: Clearwater AI Meetups
oneLiner: Regular public AI-for-business education events in Clearwater, BC — making practical AI accessible to local business owners.

name: Portal.Place
oneLiner: A real land project near Wells Gray Provincial Park — a working prototype for AI-assisted rural communities with virtual tours and investor deck.

name: Portal.Place Intel
oneLiner: AI-enriched feed of opportunities across BC and Alberta — land deals, grants, jobs, events, community news — with a feedback loop that gets smarter over time.

name: Wells Gray Resort Booking System
oneLiner: Fully custom campground booking system with interactive Leaflet.js map, OTA sync across 6 platforms, and zero per-booking fees.

name: CampSync
oneLiner: Self-hosted booking channel manager that syncs availability across Checkfront, Airbnb, HipCamp, Pitchup, and Booking.com.

name: Future Thinkers
oneLiner: Full Next.js rebuild of futurethinkers.org — 130+ podcast episodes and 12 years of content migrating off WordPress with custom podcast player.
